items.title: Halftime: Heat 52, #Magic 47
items.author: Jason Beede
items.body_excerpt:
Halftime: Heat 52, #Magic 47

Lester Quinones leads Orlando with 11 points while both Jase Richardson and Colin Castleton have 8 apiece.

For Miami, Jahmir Young has 19 and Trevor Keels with 15.

I felt Izaiyah Nelson was vocal on defense. He's got 4 points and 2 steals so far.

items.title: Watching the opener, I came away thinking Rob Dillingham might've benefited from Summer League more than I initially thought.
items.author: Drew
items.body_excerpt:
Watching the opener, I came away thinking Rob Dillingham might've benefited from Summer League more than I initially thought.

The Bulls could've used another organizer offensively, and those would've been meaningful reps for a young point guard.

The streets keeping score…Ya dig 💯. 

I don’t condone violence. But I do condone the occasional straightenin’
